alertReadOnlyBody: Create or select a draft version to edit. Active timetables are read-only.
generateNewDraftBody: Creates a brand-new draft from class subjects, teachers, and the default bell schedule (Academics settings). You can edit or activate it when ready.
selectDraftBody: Create an empty draft or clone the active timetable, then select it before filling this draft. Or use “New draft (auto)” to generate in one step.
generateDraftBody: This fills the current draft using each class subject’s weekly periods, assigned teachers (primary or first available), and lesson periods from this version’s bell schedule. Existing cells in this draft will be replaced.
activateBody: This sets this draft as the active timetable for the class. Any other active version will be archived.
readOnlyBanner: Read-only (active or archived). Clone or create a draft to edit.
swapSelected: Selected: {{subject}}. Tap another cell to swap.
emptyNoVersionManage: No timetable version yet. Create a draft, clone the active timetable, or generate.
emptyNoVersionView: No published timetable yet. An administrator must activate a timetable version before it appears here.
emptyNoLessonPeriods: No lesson periods found. Set a bell schedule on this draft or configure academic settings (default bell schedule).
helpGrid: Grid: rows = school days, columns = lesson periods (from bell schedule). Long-press a cell to clear (draft only).
helpSwapSuffix: Use Swap cells to exchange two slots.
warnNoSubjectTeacher: Assign a subject teacher for this offering first.
